item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we often prioritize collective needs over individual rights, especially in matters affecting public health or social order.

notes: Agent A starts opposed to the statement, briefly moves society-ward in turn 3, then ends with a rights-protective balance frame focused on constitutional guarantees and implementation. Agent B stays near a balanced but rights-protective position throughout, repeatedly warning that majority-oriented policy can marginalize minorities; B often opens by agreeing, so firmness is limited.
